tasks.subject: Explore codebase architecture for progress callbacks
tasks.description: Explore the codebase to understand: 1) Where extension code lives, 2) How spawn options work, 3) The pi-subagents system, 4) The /do command flow, 5) The event bus pattern

tasks.subject: Implement progress callbacks in spawn options
tasks.description: Based on exploration findings, add onToolActivity, onTextDelta, onAssistantUsage, onTurnEnd callbacks to the appropriate spawn options location

tasks.subject: Verify implementation and type-check
tasks.description: Verify that the callbacks are correctly wired up, type-check, and ensure the architecture supports the callback pattern
